name: Underwater Treasures Bubble Disk Aquarium Pump
description: Provide live-sustaining oxygen to your underwater pals with the Bubble Disk Aquarium Pump from Underwater Treasure! Simply pop in this aquarium pump and watch as oxygen-rich bubbles provide ample energy for your active fish. The size and output of your air pump can establish how large a portion of the disk will discharge these air bubbles. Plus, it is easily cleanable — just rinse the bubble disk in clear water to remove dust.
